meta.title: Find Zeros of x³ - 3x + 2 | MAT 170 Exam 2

steps.narration: Find all zeros and their multiplicities for f of x equals x cubed minus 3 x plus 2.
steps.label: MAT 170 Exam 2 Review

steps.narration: Notice there's no x squared term. Let's test some rational roots.
Test x equals 1. One minus 3 plus 2 equals zero. It works.
Divide out x minus 1 to get x squared plus x minus 2.
Factor the quadratic. x plus 2 times x minus 1. There's x minus 1 again!
So f of x equals x minus 1 squared times x plus 2.
x equals 1 has multiplicity 2 — the graph touches there. x equals negative 2 has multiplicity 1 — it crosses.
steps.label: Final Answer

steps.narration: The graph bounces at x equals 1 and crosses through at negative 2.
